ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Stock, ETF) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the instrument belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the instrument belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument on that date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index value */,
  "atr" REAL /* Average True Range value */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard Deviation value */,
  "bollinger_bands" TEXT /* Bollinger Bands values (upper, middle, lower) */,
  "moving_averages" TEXT /* Moving Averages values (short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for data access (e.g., date range, instrument) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument associated with the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed data or analysis contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance analysis, trend analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for connecting to the data source */,
  "connection_url" TEXT /* URL for establishing a connection to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument associated with the alert */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for triggering the alert (e.g., price above/below, volume above/below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price alert, volume alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
